# The AI Harness
> https://theaiharness.online

A practical knowledge base for building and deploying AI systems - from agent fundamentals to production operations. Written for engineers and technical leaders. All content is open and community-editable via GitHub.

Author: Sachin Anand | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sachin4/ | GitHub: https://github.com/sac34333/aiharness

## Guides

- [What Is an AI Agent?](https://theaiharness.online/guide/what-is-agent): Agent definition, Think-Act-Observe loop, agent anatomy, LLM vs agent vs workflow distinction, CoT vs ReAct
- [Agent Taxonomy: Levels 1-5](https://theaiharness.online/guide/agent-taxonomy): Reactive agents, memory-augmented agents, goal-driven agents, multi-agent systems, autonomous agents, production trade-offs, session state vs memory
- [Agent Design Patterns](https://theaiharness.online/guide/design-patterns): Sequential pipeline, parallel fan-out, reflection loop, multi-agent swarm, human-in-the-loop, orchestration patterns
- [Memory Architecture for AI Agents](https://theaiharness.online/guide/memory-architecture): In-context memory, external memory (RAG), in-weights memory, retrospective vs prospective memory, Google ADK state scopes
- [Google ADK](https://theaiharness.online/guide/google-adk): Agent types (LlmAgent, WorkflowAgent, CustomAgent), state scopes, tools, MCP integration, multi-agent architecture
- [Caching Overview](https://theaiharness.online/guide/caching-overview): Three caching layers, KV cache, prompt caching, semantic caching, when to use each layer
- [KV Cache](https://theaiharness.online/guide/kv-cache): Key-value cache, attention mechanism, paged attention, vLLM, GPU memory management, batch inference
- [Prompt Caching](https://theaiharness.online/guide/prompt-caching): Claude cache_control, Gemini CachedContent, Anthropic prompt caching, stable prefix rule, cache warming, TTL
- [Semantic Caching](https://theaiharness.online/guide/semantic-caching): Semantic similarity, vector embeddings, Redis cache, LiteLLM, cosine similarity threshold, what not to cache
- [Security & Interoperability](https://theaiharness.online/guide/security-interop): Agent identity, least privilege, prompt injection, A2A protocol (Google), MCP, multi-agent security
- [Agent Operations](https://theaiharness.online/guide/agent-ops): Evaluations, golden datasets, CI/CD for AI, LangSmith, observability, Datadog, tracing, production architecture
- [Developer Mindset](https://theaiharness.online/guide/developer-mindset): Non-determinism, probabilistic systems, prompts as code, eval-driven development, AI engineering discipline

## Articles

- [AI Offense Before Defense](https://theaiharness.online/articles/ai-offense-before-defense): Why defenders should use AI against themselves first. Wiz red/green/blue agents, adversarial testing, tiered autonomy, evidence-backed confidence vs blind trust
- [Sovereign AI](https://theaiharness.online/articles/sovereign-ai): Four dimensions of sovereign AI, $600bn market by 2030, infrastructure vs skills gap, Cohere/Aleph Alpha, deployment tiers
- [Token Security - The Weakest Link](https://theaiharness.online/articles/token-security): API key security, credential management, token rotation, least privilege, exfiltration prevention, tool proxy architecture
- [Shadow AI & Unsanctioned Tools](https://theaiharness.online/articles/shadow-ai): Shadow AI risk, data exfiltration, GDPR compliance, AI governance policy, making the sanctioned path easier
- [The Lazy AI Trap](https://theaiharness.online/articles/lazy-ai-trap): AI productivity trap, automation vs improvement, speed trap, ownership trap, reinvesting AI-saved time
- [Enterprise Agents at Scale](https://theaiharness.online/articles/enterprise-agents): Data layer failures, identity and access challenges, trust layer, talent reskilling, knowledge transfer
- [How to Deploy GenAI Safely](https://theaiharness.online/articles/deploy-genai-safely): Governance framework, error classification, human escalation paths, audit logging, safe deployment
- [Prompt Injection Risks](https://theaiharness.online/articles/prompt-injection): Direct injection, indirect injection, agent security, attack surface, defence strategies

## Key Concepts

- **AI Agent**: A system that perceives inputs, reasons using an LLM, and takes actions via tools in a Think-Act-Observe loop
- **KV Cache**: GPU-level cache storing attention key-value pairs to avoid recomputing identical token sequences
- **Prompt Caching**: Provider-level feature that caches stable system prompt prefixes across requests
- **Semantic Cache**: Application-level cache that retrieves cached responses for semantically similar queries
- **RAG**: Retrieval-Augmented Generation - external memory pattern where relevant documents are retrieved at query time
- **Prompt Injection**: Attack where malicious instructions in external content cause an agent to deviate from intended behaviour
- **A2A**: Agent-to-Agent protocol (Google) for inter-agent communication with scoped permissions
- **MCP**: Model Context Protocol - standard for connecting agents to external tool servers
- **Sovereign AI**: Control across four dimensions - territorial, operational, technological, and legal
- **ADK**: Google Agent Development Kit - open-source framework for building production AI agents

## Contributing

All content is open for community contribution. Propose an article, report an issue, or edit directly:
https://github.com/sac34333/aiharness
